title: Infiniresources
description: The required resourcepack for all Infini-projects.
body:
[![Read the Wiki](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95da6e7c8912a2e4caf51882d0187bc9a77fd51a.png)](https://infiniverse.gitbook.io/)
[![Chat with us on Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4ca9a5bb2d57afa6019b34cd08b90b1cfb930ce.png)](https://discord.gg/WBqEXSt9qy)

---

The required resourcepack that includes the textures the other infini-projects require to function.

For a full list of features, please refer to the wiki (linked on sidebar).

---

### MORE INFINI-PROJECTS
[![More Infiniverse Projects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e057f6af9e882eb892b47395d8931c2e3a8bede_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/collection/YtK3LmSF)

---

### CREDITS

All assets in this resourcepack are all made by [me](https://modrinth.com/user/error_dev_yt).
